title.zh: 三十九種禁止的創造性勞作(簡明解釋)

description: A clear, practical explanation of each of the 39 categories of creative work forbidden on Shabbat, with modern examples.
author: Torah Light Editorial Team

dynastyReferences: Late Han Dynasty (漢朝末期, ~200 CE)
Warring States Period (戰國時代, 369-286 BCE)
culturalParallels: Zhuangzi's teachings on action and non-action
philosophicalConnections: Concept of agency (malach/melachah) vs. Daoist non-action
